definition:
1. to push back, stop short, check , ἵππον χαλινῶι (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. Mid., ἀνακρούεσθαι πρύμνην to put one's  ship astern, by backing water, (Aristophanes Comicus); so ἀνακρούεσθαι alone, (Thucydides); also, ἐπὶ πρύμνην ἀν., (Herdotus Historicus):—;metaphorically to put back , (Plato Philosophus) 
3. in Music, to strike up , (Theocritus Poeta Bucolicus) (ML)
